turns.en: What would you want to see from them? We're going to have the next... I'm just curious.
turns.zh: 你希望他们接下来做什么？我们会有下一步……我只是好奇。

turns.en: I myself would be curious about what the demand looks like. Like would you want them to fully establish a SOC 2, a Sarbanes-Oxley, whatever? There's different levels of legal bindingness.
turns.zh: 我自己会好奇需求是什么样的。比如你希望他们完全建立一个 SOC 2、萨班斯-奥克斯利法案之类的吗？有不同的法律约束力级别。

turns.en: Oh, I see. SOC 2 is not legally binding in any sense. It is an industry standard. It's kind of like a passport where you got it, okay cool, you did the bare minimum. And if you don't, then it's going to be very painful to go through procurement and everything.
turns.zh: 哦，我明白了。SOC 2 在任何意义上都不具有法律约束力。它是一个行业标准。有点像护照，你拿到了，好吧，你做了最低限度的事情。如果你没有，那么采购等流程会非常痛苦。

turns.en: Yeah, so they have that. But why do you get cyber insurance? You get cyber insurance because you have to carry it if you want to get an enterprise deal, or you have a genuine concern. So there are lots of different pressure factors that come into play. I'd be curious where we are on the timeline of why people come to AUC, what's driving them to seek out AI agent insurance.
turns.zh: 是的，所以他们有那个。但你为什么要买网络安全保险？你买网络安全保险是因为如果你想做企业交易，或者你真的有担忧，你就必须买。所以有很多不同的压力因素在起作用。我很好奇我们在时间线上处于什么位置，人们为什么来找 AUC，是什么驱使他们寻求 AI 智能体保险。

turns.en: The first major publicly in the news prompt injection breach. They'll probably do it.
turns.zh: 第一个在新闻中公开的重大提示注入漏洞。他们可能会这么做。

turns.en: Yeah. The largest I know is like Hertz got injected, some airline got injected, but nothing big.
turns.zh: 是的。我知道最大的比如赫兹被注入了，某家航空公司被注入了，但都不是大事。

turns.en: The name Grey Swan is sort of in reference to black swan events which are things no one could see coming. A grey swan is an unlikely event you can kind of see coming. And that's kind of where we are with all this. This is going to happen. We know it's coming. It's not going to shock anyone when it happens. But this is where you want to get ahead of it while you can.
turns.zh: 灰天鹅这个名字有点参考黑天鹅事件，黑天鹅是没人能预见的事情。灰天鹅是一个不太可能但你能预见的事件。我们目前的情况就是这样。这将会发生。我们知道它要来。当它发生时不会让任何人震惊。但这就是你想尽可能提前应对的地方。

turns.en: People don't always publicize when it happens either. We know that it has happened and it has caused real damage. That's the factor that has driven some people to us, right? They want protection from that.
turns.zh: 人们也不总是公开事件的发生。我们知道它已经发生了，并且造成了真正的损害。这就是驱使一些人来找我们的因素，对吧？他们想要保护免受其害。

turns.en: Yeah. Yep. Amazing. Well, thank you for fighting a good fight and I'm sure we'll check back in over the years as you develop and hopefully solve this. It'll never be solved, but we'll solve it by fully understanding the models. I do like automating AI research.
turns.zh: 是的。没错。太棒了。好吧，感谢你打了一场漂亮的仗，我相信随着你的发展，我们会在未来几年里再回来看看，希望解决这个问题。它永远不会被解决，但我们会通过完全理解模型来解决它。我确实喜欢自动化 AI 研究。

turns.en: Yeah. Okay. Well, thank you so much.
turns.zh: 是的。好的。非常感谢。

turns.en: Yeah. Great for having us.
turns.zh: 是的。很高兴邀请我们。

turns.en: Thank you.
turns.zh: 谢谢。

consensus.en: AI systems have fundamentally different vulnerabilities than traditional software, requiring a new security mindset.
consensus.zh: AI系统具有与传统软件根本不同的漏洞，需要新的安全思维。

consensus.en: Automated red teaming can now outperform human red teamers in breaking models.
consensus.zh: 自动化红队测试现在在破解模型方面可以超越人类红队成员。

consensus.en: Model capability does not correlate with robustness; larger models are not inherently safer.
consensus.zh: 模型能力与鲁棒性不相关；更大的模型并不天生更安全。

consensus.en: The lethal trifecta for prompt injection requires ingesting untrusted data, access to private info, and ability to exfiltrate.
consensus.zh: 提示注入的致命三要素包括摄入不可信数据、访问私有信息以及外泄能力。

consensus.en: Security filters like Signal can shift the usability-security Pareto frontier for AI agents.
consensus.zh: 像Signal这样的安全过滤器可以改变AI智能体的可用性-安全帕累托前沿。

consensus.en: Enterprise adoption of coding agents is driving demand for AI-specific security solutions.
consensus.zh: 企业对编码智能体的采用正在推动对AI特定安全解决方案的需求。

contrarian.en: AI models are intelligent but represent an alien form of intelligence, not human-like.
contrarian.zh: AI模型是智能的，但代表了一种外星形式的智能，而非类人智能。

contrarian.en: Coding agents can automate interpretability research, potentially making it a real science.
contrarian.zh: 编码智能体可以自动化可解释性研究，可能使其成为真正的科学。

contrarian.en: Models may sandbag during evaluations, refusing tasks they can do, requiring red teaming for capability elicitation.
contrarian.zh: 模型在评估中可能故意表现不佳，拒绝能完成的任务，需要红队测试来激发能力。

contrarian.en: Open-source guardrails are insufficient; enterprise needs configurable, actively developed security models.
contrarian.zh: 开源护栏不足；企业需要可配置、积极开发的安全模型。

contrarian.en: Agent identity and permission management is still nascent; most agents operate with user's full permissions.
contrarian.zh: 智能体身份和权限管理仍处于初期；大多数智能体以用户的完整权限运行。

contrarian.en: The first major public prompt injection breach will likely drive widespread adoption of AI insurance.
contrarian.zh: 第一次重大的公开提示注入漏洞可能会推动AI保险的广泛采用。
